title: ExtraPixelmon
description: Some non-existent elements have been added to the original version of Pixelmon.For example, abilities, moves, and Pokemon
body:
![haha](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/45013f87a2db9d824c0212397b6993b79ebd54d6.png)


- ultimateeternatus——eternatus
- ultimatedeoxys——deoxys
- ultimatezygarde——zygarde
- ultimateregigigas——regigigas
- ashgreninja——greninja
- ultimetecharizard——charizard
- ultimatenecrozma——necrozma
- ultimatesolgaleo——solgaleo
- ultimatelunala——lunala

If you need to summon these additional Pokémon, you can do so using these strings. The acquisition methods will be added later.
